arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى فَهْمِ ذَلِكَ لِتَسْلَمَ مِنَ الِانْحِرَافِ وَالْفِتَنِ. [1]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā fahmi dhālika li-taslama minal-inḥirāfi wal-fitan. (1)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, so be diligent in understanding that to remain safe from deviation and trials. (Stanza 1)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, fexeel ba xam lolu ngir nga dagan ci bépp dëngël walla mbugal. (Wers 1)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ فِخِيلْ بَ خَمْ لُلُ نْجِرْ نْجَ دَجَنْ سِ بِيقْ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ [1]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ وَلَا تَلْتَفِتْ إِلَى أَقْوَالِ مَنْ حُرِمَ رَائِحَةَ الْعِرْفَانِ وَالْأَدَبِ. [2]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq wa lā taltafit ilā aqwāli man ḥurima rā'iḥatal-‘irfāni wal-adab. (2)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, and pay no attention to the claims of whoever is deprived of the scent of gnosis and etiquette. (Stanza 2)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, te bul xool kàdduy keneen ku andul ak sutura walla xam-xamum ruu. (Wers 2)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ تِ بُلْ خُولْ كَدُّيْ كِنِينْ كُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ سُتُرَ وَلَّ خَمْ خَمُمْ رُو [2]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ وَبِهَذَا يَظْهَرُ لَكَ بُطْلَانُ شُبَهَاتِ الْجَاحِدِينَ الْأَغْمَارِ. [3]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm wa bi-hādhā yaẓharu laka buṭlānu shubahātil-jāḥidīnal-aghmār. (3)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, and by this, the falsehood of the doubts of ignorant deniers becomes manifest to you. (Stanza 3)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, te ci lolu la lay féeñé ne waxi koñkat yi lu daganadi la te sellul. (Wers 3)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ لَيْ فِيرْيِ نِ وَخِ كُنْكَتْ يِ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ سِلُّلْ [3]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ فَالنُّورُ السَّاطِعُ لَا يَحْجِبُهُ غُبَارُ التَّعَصُّبِ وَالْأَهْوَاءِ. [4]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām fal-nūrus-sāṭi‘u lā yaḥjibuhu ghubārut-ta‘aṣṣubi wal-ahwā'. (4)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, for the shining light is not veiled by the dust of fanaticism and personal whims. (Stanza 4)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, ndax leeraay buy féeñ, rëxu dëngël walla mbugal mënul ko laxat. (Wers 4)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ نْدَخْ لِيرَايْ بُيْ فِيرْ رِخُ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ مِࣺنُلْ كُ لَخَتْ [4]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ وَلِذَلِكَ كَانَ الْأَكَابِرُ يَعْتَصِمُونَ بِالْفِقْهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ دَائِماً. [5]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār wa li-dhālika kānal-akābiru ya‘taṣimūna bil-fiqhi fis-sulūki dā'imā. (5)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, therefore, the great masters always held fast to jurisprudence in their spiritual wayfaring. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, te lolu tax na Seriñ yu mag yi dëgëral yoon wi ci xam-xamum fiqh sa sùnek. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ سِرِجْ يُ مَجْ يِ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ يُونْ وِ سِ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ سَ سُنِكْ [5]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ فَهُوَ النَّهْجُ الْقَوِيمُ الَّذِي سَارَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَفُ الصَّالِحُ. [6]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' fahuwan-nahjul-qawīmul-ladhī sāra ‘alayhis-salafuṣ-ṣāliḥ. (6)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, for it is the straight approach upon which the righteous predecessors walked. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, moom mooy yoon wu jub wi ñi jiitu woon té rafet doxé woon ci kaw suuf. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ مُومْ مُويْ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وِ نْيِ جِيتُ وُونْ تِ رَفِتْ دُخِ وُونْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [6]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ وَمَنْ خَالَفَ هَذَا الْأَصْلَ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ الْأَقْوَمِ. [7]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq wa man khālafa hādhal-aṣla faqad ḍalla ‘aniṣ-ṣirāṭil-aqwam. (7)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, and whoever opposes this foundation has strayed from the most upright path. (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, te ku moy yoon mii dëg dëg sotti na ca yoonu mbugal yu rëy. (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ تِ كُ مُيْ يُونْ مِي دِࣺجّ دِٜجّ سُتِّ نَ سَ يُونُ مْبُجَلْ يُ رِي [7]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ لِأَنَّ مَقْصَدَ الْقَوْمِ هُوَ تَصْفِيَةُ الْقَلْبِ لِتَحْقِيقِ كَمَالِ الْإِخْلَاصِ. [8]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah li'anna maqṣadal-qawmi huwa taṣfiyatul-qalbi li-taḥqīqi kamālil-ikhlāṣ. (8)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, because the purpose of the masters is purification of the heart to achieve perfection of sincerity. (Stanza 8)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, ndax li Seriñ yi bëgg rekk mooy laabal xol yi ngir dëgëral sellal gu mat. (Wers 8)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ نْدَخْ لِ سِرِجْ يِ بِجِّ رِكْ مُويْ لَابَلْ خُلْ يِ نْجِرْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سِلَّلْ جُ مَتْ [8]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ شِفَاءٌ لِلصُّدُورِ وَنَجَاةٌ لِلنُّفُوسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ. [9]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah wa fī dhālika shifā'un liṣ-ṣudūri wa najātun lin-nufūsi yawmal-qiyāmah. (9)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, and in that is healing for the breasts and salvation for the souls on the Day of Resurrection. (Stanza 9)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, te ca lolu la saafara nekk ngir xol yi ak ndam ca bisu àllaxira. (Wers 9)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَافَرَ نِكَّ نْجِرْ خُلْ يِ اَكْ نْدَمْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ [9]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ فَالْزَمْ مَجَالِسَ الْعِلْمِ وَالذِّكْرِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَنْوَارَ السَّنِيَّةَ. [10]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq fal-zam majālisal-‘ilmi wadh-dhikri li-tanālal-anwāras-saniyyah. (10)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, so cling to the assemblies of knowledge and remembrance to receive elevated lights. (Stanza 10)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, kon sàmmeel sa bopp jàng ak tudd Yàlla ngir nga am leeraay yu rëy. (Wers 10)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ كُنْ سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ جَنْجْ اَكْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي [10]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ وَلَا تَكُنْ مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ الَّذِينَ يَطْلُبُونَ الدُّنْيَا بِالدِّينِ. [11]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm wa lā takun minal-ghāfilīnal-ladhīna yaṭlubūnad-dunyā bid-dīn. (11)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, and do not be among the heedless who seek this worldly life through religion. (Stanza 11)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, te bul bokk ci ñi bëgg àdduna te di jaaye seen diine mbir yu néew. (Wers 11)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ تِ بُلْ بُكِّ سِ نْيِ بِجِّ اَدُّنَ تِ دِ جَايِ سِينْ دِينِ مْبِرْ يُ نِيوْ [11]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ فَالْحَقُّ أَبْلَجُ وَالْبَاطِلُ لَجْلَجٌ وَالْعَاقِلُ مَنْ يَتَّبِعُ الدَّلِيلَ. [12]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām fal-ḥaqqu ablaju wal-bāṭilu lajlaju wal-‘āqilu man yattabi‘ud-dalīl. (12)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, for truth is clear, falsehood is confused, and the wise person is one who follows evidence. (Stanza 12)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, ndax dëgg féeñ na te leen dëngël féeñ na, te ku am xel mooy topp tére yi. (Wers 12)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ نْدَخْ دِٜجّ فِيرْ نَ تِ لِينْ دِٜnْجِٜlْ فِيرْ نَ تِ كُ اَمْ خَلْ مُويْ تُپْ تِيرِ يِ [12]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ وَبِذَلِكَ نَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْقَبُولَ وَالثَّبَاتَ عَلَى الصِّرَاطِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ. [13]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār wa bi-dhālika nas'alullāhal-qabūla wat-thabāta ‘alāṣ-ṣirāṭil-mustaqīm. (13)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, and with that we ask Allah for acceptance and firmness upon the straight path. (Stanza 13)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, te lolu la nuy ñaane sa Boroom mu nangu te dëgëral nu ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 13)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ تِ لُلُ لَ نُيْ نْيَانِ سَ بُرُومْ مُ نَنْجُ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [13]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ لِيَكُونَ عَمَلُنَا كُلُّهُ خَالِصاً لِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ بِلَا رِيَاءٍ. [14]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' li-yakūna ‘amalunā kulluhu khāliṣan li-wajhihil-karīmi bilā riyā'. (14)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, so that all of our work is purely for His Noble Countenance, without ostentation. (Stanza 14)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, ngir sunu liggeey yépp sell ngir Moom rekk, andul ak rëy walla féeñ. (Wers 14)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ نْجِرْ سُنُ لِجِي يِٚpْ سِلْ نْجِرْ مُومْ رِكْ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ رِي وَلَّ فِيرْ [14]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ فَهَذَا هُوَ الطَّرِيقُ الْوَاضِحُ الَّذِي لَا مِرَاءَ فِيهِ وَلَا غُمُوضَ. [15]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq fahādhā huwat-ṭarīqul-wāḍiḥul-ladhī lā mirā'a fīhi wa lā ghumūḍ. (15)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, for this is the clear path in which there is no dispute or ambiguity. (Stanza 15)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, ndax jii mooy yoon wu féeñ wi amul lëndëm walla wax yu dëng. (Wers 15)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ نْدَخْ جِي مُويْ يُونْ وُ فِيرْ وِ اَمُلْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ وَلَّ وَخْ يُ دِٜnْجْ [15]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى فَهْمِ ذَلِكَ لِتَسْلَمَ مِنَ الِانْحِرَافِ وَالْفِتَنِ. [16]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā fahmi dhālika li-taslama minal-inḥirāfi wal-fitan. (16)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, so be diligent in understanding that to remain safe from deviation and trials. (Stanza 16)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, fexeel ba xam lolu ngir nga dagan ci bépp dëngël walla mbugal. (Wers 16)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ فِخِيلْ بَ خَمْ لُلُ نْجِرْ نْجَ دَجَنْ سِ بِيقْ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ [16]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ وَلَا تَلْتَفِتْ إِلَى أَقْوَالِ مَنْ حُرِمَ رَائِحَةَ الْعِرْفَانِ وَالْأَدَبِ. [17]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah wa lā taltafit ilā aqwāli man ḥurima rā'iḥatal-‘irfāni wal-adab. (17)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, and pay no attention to the claims of whoever is deprived of the scent of gnosis and etiquette. (Stanza 17)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, te bul xool kàdduy keneen ku andul ak sutura walla xam-xamum ruu. (Wers 17)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ تِ بُلْ خُولْ كَدُّيْ كِنِينْ كُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ سُتُرَ وَلَّ خَمْ خَمُمْ رُو [17]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ وَبِهَذَا يَظْهَرُ لَكَ بُطْلَانُ شُبَهَاتِ الْجَاحِدِينَ الْأَغْمَارِ. [18]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq wa bi-hādhā yaẓharu laka buṭlānu shubahātil-jāḥidīnal-aghmār. (18)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, and by this, the falsehood of the doubts of ignorant deniers becomes manifest to you. (Stanza 18)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, te ci lolu la lay féeñé ne waxi koñkat yi lu daganadi la te sellul. (Wers 18)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ لَيْ فِيرْيِ نِ وَخِ كُنْكَتْ يِ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ سِلُّلْ [18]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ فَالنُّورُ السَّاطِعُ لَا يَحْجِبُهُ غُبَارُ التَّعَصُّبِ وَالْأَهْوَاءِ. [19]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm fal-nūrus-sāṭi‘u lā yaḥjibuhu ghubārut-ta‘aṣṣubi wal-ahwā'. (19)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, for the shining light is not veiled by the dust of fanaticism and personal whims. (Stanza 19)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, ndax leeraay buy féeñ, rëxu dëngël walla mbugal mënul ko laxat. (Wers 19)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ نْدَخْ لِيرَايْ بُيْ فِيرْ رِخُ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ مِࣺنُلْ كُ لَخَتْ [19]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ وَلِذَلِكَ كَانَ الْأَكَابِرُ يَعْتَصِمُونَ بِالْفِقْهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ دَائِماً. [20]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām wa li-dhālika kānal-akābiru ya‘taṣimūna bil-fiqhi fis-sulūki dā'imā. (20)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, therefore, the great masters always held fast to jurisprudence in their spiritual wayfaring. (Stanza 20)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, te lolu tax na Seriñ yu mag yi dëgëral yoon wi ci xam-xamum fiqh sa sùnek. (Wers 20)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ سِرِجْ يُ مَجْ يِ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ يُونْ وِ سِ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ سَ سُنِكْ [20]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ فَهُوَ النَّهْجُ الْقَوِيمُ الَّذِي سَارَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَفُ الصَّالِحُ. [21]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār fahuwan-nahjul-qawīmul-ladhī sāra ‘alayhis-salafuṣ-ṣāliḥ. (21)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, for it is the straight approach upon which the righteous predecessors walked. (Stanza 21)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, moom mooy yoon wu jub wi ñi jiitu woon té rafet doxé woon ci kaw suuf. (Wers 21)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ مُومْ مُويْ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وِ نْيِ جِيتُ وُونْ تِ رَفِتْ دُخِ وُونْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [21]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ وَمَنْ خَالَفَ هَذَا الْأَصْلَ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ الْأَقْوَمِ. [22]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' wa man khālafa hādhal-aṣla faqad ḍalla ‘aniṣ-ṣirāṭil-aqwam. (22)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, and whoever opposes this foundation has strayed from the most upright path. (Stanza 22)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, te ku moy yoon mii dëg dëg sotti na ca yoonu mbugal yu rëy. (Wers 22)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ تِ كُ مُيْ يُونْ مِي دِࣺجّ دِٜجّ سُتِّ نَ سَ يُونُ مْبُجَلْ يُ رِي [22]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ لِأَنَّ مَقْصَدَ الْقَوْمِ هُوَ تَصْفِيَةُ الْقَلْبِ لِتَحْقِيقِ كَمَالِ الْإِخْلَاصِ. [23]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq li'anna maqṣadal-qawmi huwa taṣfiyatul-qalbi li-taḥqīqi kamālil-ikhlāṣ. (23)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, because the purpose of the masters is purification of the heart to achieve perfection of sincerity. (Stanza 23)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, ndax li Seriñ yi bëgg rekk mooy laabal xol yi ngir dëgëral sellal gu mat. (Wers 23)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ نْدَخْ لِ سِرِجْ يِ بِجِّ رِكْ مُويْ لَابَلْ خُلْ يِ نْجِرْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سِلَّلْ جُ مَتْ [23]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ شِفَاءٌ لِلصُّدُورِ وَنَجَاةٌ لِلنُّفُوسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ. [24]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah wa fī dhālika shifā'un liṣ-ṣudūri wa najātun lin-nufūsi yawmal-qiyāmah. (24)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, and in that is healing for the breasts and salvation for the souls on the Day of Resurrection. (Stanza 24)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, te ca lolu la saafara nekk ngir xol yi ak ndam ca bisu àllaxira. (Wers 24)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَافَرَ نِكَّ نْجِرْ خُلْ يِ اَكْ نْدَمْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ [24]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ فَالْزَمْ مَجَالِسَ الْعِلْمِ وَالذِّكْرِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَنْوَارَ السَّنِيَّةَ. [25]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah fal-zam majālisal-‘ilmi wadh-dhikri li-tanālal-anwāras-saniyyah. (25)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, so cling to the assemblies of knowledge and remembrance to receive elevated lights. (Stanza 25)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, kon sàmmeel sa bopp jàng ak tudd Yàlla ngir nga am leeraay yu rëy. (Wers 25)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ كُنْ سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ جَنْجْ اَكْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي [25]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ وَلَا تَكُنْ مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ الَّذِينَ يَطْلُبُونَ الدُّنْيَا بِالدِّينِ. [26]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq wa lā takun minal-ghāfilīnal-ladhīna yaṭlubūnad-dunyā bid-dīn. (26)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, and do not be among the heedless who seek this worldly life through religion. (Stanza 26)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, te bul bokk ci ñi bëgg àdduna te di jaaye seen diine mbir yu néew. (Wers 26)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ تِ بُلْ بُكِّ سِ نْيِ بِجِّ اَدُّنَ تِ دِ جَايِ سِينْ دِينِ مْبِرْ يُ نِيوْ [26]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ فَالْحَقُّ أَبْلَجُ وَالْبَاطِلُ لَجْلَجٌ وَالْعَاقِلُ مَنْ يَتَّبِعُ الدَّلِيلَ. [27]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm fal-ḥaqqu ablaju wal-bāṭilu lajlaju wal-‘āqilu man yattabi‘ud-dalīl. (27)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, for truth is clear, falsehood is confused, and the wise person is one who follows evidence. (Stanza 27)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, ndax dëgg féeñ na te leen dëngël féeñ na, te ku am xel mooy topp tére yi. (Wers 27)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ نْدَخْ دِٜجّ فِيرْ نَ تِ لِينْ دِٜnْجِٜlْ فِيرْ نَ تِ كُ اَمْ خَلْ مُويْ تُپْ تِيرِ يِ [27]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ وَبِذَلِكَ نَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْقَبُولَ وَالثَّبَاتَ عَلَى الصِّرَاطِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ. [28]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām wa bi-dhālika nas'alullāhal-qabūla wat-thabāta ‘alāṣ-ṣirāṭil-mustaqīm. (28)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, and with that we ask Allah for acceptance and firmness upon the straight path. (Stanza 28)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, te lolu la nuy ñaane sa Boroom mu nangu te dëgëral nu ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ تِ لُلُ لَ نُيْ نْيَانِ سَ بُرُومْ مُ نَنْجُ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [28]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ لِيَكُونَ عَمَلُنَا كُلُّهُ خَالِصاً لِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ بِلَا رِيَاءٍ. [29]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār li-yakūna ‘amalunā kulluhu khāliṣan li-wajhihil-karīmi bilā riyā'. (29)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, so that all of our work is purely for His Noble Countenance, without ostentation. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, ngir sunu liggeey yépp sell ngir Moom rekk, andul ak rëy walla féeñ. (Wers 29)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ نْجِرْ سُنُ لِجِي يِٚpْ سِلْ نْجِرْ مُومْ رِكْ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ رِي وَلَّ فِيرْ [29]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ فَهَذَا هُوَ الطَّرِيقُ الْوَاضِحُ الَّذِي لَا مِرَاءَ فِيهِ وَلَا غُمُوضَ. [30]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' fahādhā huwat-ṭarīqul-wāḍiḥul-ladhī lā mirā'a fīhi wa lā ghumūḍ. (30)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, for this is the clear path in which there is no dispute or ambiguity. (Stanza 30)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, ndax jii mooy yoon wu féeñ wi amul lëndëm walla wax yu dëng. (Wers 30)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ نْدَخْ جِي مُويْ يُونْ وُ فِيرْ وِ اَمُلْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ وَلَّ وَخْ يُ دِٜnْجْ [30]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى فَهْمِ ذَلِكَ لِتَسْلَمَ مِنَ الِانْحِرَافِ وَالْفِتَنِ. [31]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā fahmi dhālika li-taslama minal-inḥirāfi wal-fitan. (31)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, so be diligent in understanding that to remain safe from deviation and trials. (Stanza 31)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, fexeel ba xam lolu ngir nga dagan ci bépp dëngël walla mbugal. (Wers 31)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ فِخِيلْ بَ خَمْ لُلُ نْجِرْ نْجَ دَجَنْ سِ بِيقْ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ [31]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ وَلَا تَلْتَفِتْ إِلَى أَقْوَالِ مَنْ حُرِمَ رَائِحَةَ الْعِرْفَانِ وَالْأَدَبِ. [32]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah wa lā taltafit ilā aqwāli man ḥurima rā'iḥatal-‘irfāni wal-adab. (32)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, and pay no attention to the claims of whoever is deprived of the scent of gnosis and etiquette. (Stanza 32)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, te bul xool kàdduy keneen ku andul ak sutura walla xam-xamum ruu. (Wers 32)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ تِ بُلْ خُولْ كَدُّيْ كِنِينْ كُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ سُتُرَ وَلَّ خَمْ خَمُمْ رُو [32]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ وَبِهَذَا يَظْهَرُ لَكَ بُطْلَانُ شُبَهَاتِ الْجَاحِدِينَ الْأَغْمَارِ. [33]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah wa bi-hādhā yaẓharu laka buṭlānu shubahātil-jāḥidīnal-aghmār. (33)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, and by this, the falsehood of the doubts of ignorant deniers becomes manifest to you. (Stanza 33)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, te ci lolu la lay féeñé ne waxi koñkat yi lu daganadi la te sellul. (Wers 33)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ لَيْ فِيرْيِ نِ وَخِ كُنْكَتْ يِ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ سِلُّلْ [33]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ فَالنُّورُ السَّاطِعُ لَا يَحْجِبُهُ غُبَارُ التَّعَصُّبِ وَالْأَهْوَاءِ. [34]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq fal-nūrus-sāṭi‘u lā yaḥjibuhu ghubārut-ta‘aṣṣubi wal-ahwā'. (34)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, for the shining light is not veiled by the dust of fanaticism and personal whims. (Stanza 34)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, ndax leeraay buy féeñ, rëxu dëngël walla mbugal mënul ko laxat. (Wers 34)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ نْدَخْ لِيرَايْ بُيْ فِيرْ رِخُ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ مِࣺنُلْ كُ لَخَتْ [34]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ وَلِذَلِكَ كَانَ الْأَكَابِرُ يَعْتَصِمُونَ بِالْفِقْهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ دَائِماً. [35]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm wa li-dhālika kānal-akābiru ya‘taṣimūna bil-fiqhi fis-sulūki dā'imā. (35)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, therefore, the great masters always held fast to jurisprudence in their spiritual wayfaring. (Stanza 35)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, te lolu tax na Seriñ yu mag yi dëgëral yoon wi ci xam-xamum fiqh sa sùnek. (Wers 35)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ سِرِجْ يُ مَجْ يِ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ يُونْ وِ سِ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ سَ سُنِكْ [35]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ فَهُوَ النَّهْجُ الْقَوِيمُ الَّذِي سَارَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَفُ الصَّالِحُ. [36]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām fahuwan-nahjul-qawīmul-ladhī sāra ‘alayhis-salafuṣ-ṣāliḥ. (36)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, for it is the straight approach upon which the righteous predecessors walked. (Stanza 36)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, moom mooy yoon wu jub wi ñi jiitu woon té rafet doxé woon ci kaw suuf. (Wers 36)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ مُومْ مُويْ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وِ نْيِ جِيتُ وُونْ تِ رَفِتْ دُخِ وُونْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [36]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ وَمَنْ خَالَفَ هَذَا الْأَصْلَ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ الْأَقْوَمِ. [37]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār wa man khālafa hādhal-aṣla faqad ḍalla ‘aniṣ-ṣirāṭil-aqwam. (37)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, and whoever opposes this foundation has strayed from the most upright path. (Stanza 37)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, te ku moy yoon mii dëg dëg sotti na ca yoonu mbugal yu rëy. (Wers 37)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ تِ كُ مُيْ يُونْ مِي دِࣺجّ دِٜجّ سُتِّ نَ سَ يُونُ مْبُجَلْ يُ رِي [37]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ لِأَنَّ مَقْصَدَ الْقَوْمِ هُوَ تَصْفِيَةُ الْقَلْبِ لِتَحْقِيقِ كَمَالِ الْإِخْلَاصِ. [38]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' li'anna maqṣadal-qawmi huwa taṣfiyatul-qalbi li-taḥqīqi kamālil-ikhlāṣ. (38)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, because the purpose of the masters is purification of the heart to achieve perfection of sincerity. (Stanza 38)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, ndax li Seriñ yi bëgg rekk mooy laabal xol yi ngir dëgëral sellal gu mat. (Wers 38)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ نْدَخْ لِ سِرِجْ يِ بِجِّ رِكْ مُويْ لَابَلْ خُلْ يِ نْجِرْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سِلَّلْ جُ مَتْ [38]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ وَفِي ذَلِكَ شِفَاءٌ لِلصُّدُورِ وَنَجَاةٌ لِلنُّفُوسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ. [39]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq wa fī dhālika shifā'un liṣ-ṣudūri wa najātun lin-nufūsi yawmal-qiyāmah. (39)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, and in that is healing for the breasts and salvation for the souls on the Day of Resurrection. (Stanza 39)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, te ca lolu la saafara nekk ngir xol yi ak ndam ca bisu àllaxira. (Wers 39)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَافَرَ نِكَّ نْجِرْ خُلْ يِ اَكْ نْدَمْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ [39]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ فَالْزَمْ مَجَالِسَ الْعِلْمِ وَالذِّكْرِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَنْوَارَ السَّنِيَّةَ. [40]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah fal-zam majālisal-‘ilmi wadh-dhikri li-tanālal-anwāras-saniyyah. (40)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, so cling to the assemblies of knowledge and remembrance to receive elevated lights. (Stanza 40)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, kon sàmmeel sa bopp jàng ak tudd Yàlla ngir nga am leeraay yu rëy. (Wers 40)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ كُنْ سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ جَنْجْ اَكْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي [40]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ وَلَا تَكُنْ مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ الَّذِينَ يَطْلُبُونَ الدُّنْيَا بِالدِّينِ. [41]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah wa lā takun minal-ghāfilīnal-ladhīna yaṭlubūnad-dunyā bid-dīn. (41)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, and do not be among the heedless who seek this worldly life through religion. (Stanza 41)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, te bul bokk ci ñi bëgg àdduna te di jaaye seen diine mbir yu néew. (Wers 41)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ تِ بُلْ بُكِّ سِ نْيِ بِجِّ اَدُّنَ تِ دِ جَايِ سِينْ دِينِ مْبِرْ يُ نِيوْ [41]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ فَالْحَقُّ أَبْلَجُ وَالْبَاطِلُ لَجْلَجٌ وَالْعَاقِلُ مَنْ يَتَّبِعُ الدَّلِيلَ. [42]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq fal-ḥaqqu ablaju wal-bāṭilu lajlaju wal-‘āqilu man yattabi‘ud-dalīl. (42)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, for truth is clear, falsehood is confused, and the wise person is one who follows evidence. (Stanza 42)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, ndax dëgg féeñ na te leen dëngël féeñ na, te ku am xel mooy topp tére yi. (Wers 42)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ نْدَخْ دِٜجّ فِيرْ نَ تِ لِينْ دِٜnْجِٜlْ فِيرْ نَ تِ كُ اَمْ خَلْ مُويْ تُپْ تِيرِ يِ [42]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ وَبِذَلِكَ نَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْقَبُولَ وَالثَّبَاتَ عَلَى الصِّرَاطِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ. [43]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm wa bi-dhālika nas'alullāhal-qabūla wat-thabāta ‘alāṣ-ṣirāṭil-mustaqīm. (43)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, and with that we ask Allah for acceptance and firmness upon the straight path. (Stanza 43)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, te lolu la nuy ñaane sa Boroom mu nangu te dëgëral nu ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 43)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ تِ لُلُ لَ نُيْ نْيَانِ سَ بُرُومْ مُ نَنْجُ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [43]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ لِيَكُونَ عَمَلُنَا كُلُّهُ خَالِصاً لِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ بِلَا رِيَاءٍ. [44]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām li-yakūna ‘amalunā kulluhu khāliṣan li-wajhihil-karīmi bilā riyā'. (44)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, so that all of our work is purely for His Noble Countenance, without ostentation. (Stanza 44)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, ngir sunu liggeey yépp sell ngir Moom rekk, andul ak rëy walla féeñ. (Wers 44)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ نْجِرْ سُنُ لِجِي يِٚpْ سِلْ نْجِرْ مُومْ رِكْ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ رِي وَلَّ فِيرْ [44]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ فَهَذَا هُوَ الطَّرِيقُ الْوَاضِحُ الَّذِي لَا مِرَاءَ فِيهِ وَلَا غُمُوضَ. [45]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār fahādhā huwat-ṭarīqul-wāḍiḥul-ladhī lā mirā'a fīhi wa lā ghumūḍ. (45)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, for this is the clear path in which there is no dispute or ambiguity. (Stanza 45)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, ndax jii mooy yoon wu féeñ wi amul lëndëm walla wax yu dëng. (Wers 45)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ نْدَخْ جِي مُويْ يُونْ وُ فِيرْ وِ اَمُلْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ وَلَّ وَخْ يُ دِٜnْجْ [45]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى فَهْمِ ذَلِكَ لِتَسْلَمَ مِنَ الِانْحِرَافِ وَالْفِتَنِ. [46]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā fahmi dhālika li-taslama minal-inḥirāfi wal-fitan. (46)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, so be diligent in understanding that to remain safe from deviation and trials. (Stanza 46)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, fexeel ba xam lolu ngir nga dagan ci bépp dëngël walla mbugal. (Wers 46)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ فِخِيلْ بَ خَمْ لُلُ نْجِرْ نْجَ دَجَنْ سِ بِيقْ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ [46]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ وَلَا تَلْتَفِتْ إِلَى أَقْوَالِ مَنْ حُرِمَ رَائِحَةَ الْعِرْفَانِ وَالْأَدَبِ. [47]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq wa lā taltafit ilā aqwāli man ḥurima rā'iḥatal-‘irfāni wal-adab. (47)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, and pay no attention to the claims of whoever is deprived of the scent of gnosis and etiquette. (Stanza 47)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, te bul xool kàdduy keneen ku andul ak sutura walla xam-xamum ruu. (Wers 47)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ تِ بُلْ خُولْ كَدُّيْ كِنِينْ كُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ سُتُرَ وَلَّ خَمْ خَمُمْ رُو [47]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ وَبِهَذَا يَظْهَرُ لَكَ بُطْلَانُ شُبَهَاتِ الْجَاحِدِينَ الْأَغْمَارِ. [48]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah wa bi-hādhā yaẓharu laka buṭlānu shubahātil-jāḥidīnal-aghmār. (48)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, and by this, the falsehood of the doubts of ignorant deniers becomes manifest to you. (Stanza 48)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, te ci lolu la lay féeñé ne waxi koñkat yi lu daganadi la te sellul. (Wers 48)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ لَيْ فِيرْيِ نِ وَخِ كُنْكَتْ يِ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ سِلُّلْ [48]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ فَالنُّورُ السَّاطِعُ لَا يَحْجِبُهُ غُبَارُ التَّعَصُّبِ وَالْأَهْوَاءِ. [49]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah fal-nūrus-sāṭi‘u lā yaḥjibuhu ghubārut-ta‘aṣṣubi wal-ahwā'. (49)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, for the shining light is not veiled by the dust of fanaticism and personal whims. (Stanza 49)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, ndax leeraay buy féeñ, rëxu dëngël walla mbugal mënul ko laxat. (Wers 49)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ نْدَخْ لِيرَايْ بُيْ فِيرْ رِخُ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ مِࣺنُلْ كُ لَخَتْ [49]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ وَلِذَلِكَ كَانَ الْأَكَابِرُ يَعْتَصِمُونَ بِالْفِقْهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ دَائِماً. [50]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq wa li-dhālika kānal-akābiru ya‘taṣimūna bil-fiqhi fis-sulūki dā'imā. (50)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, therefore, the great masters always held fast to jurisprudence in their spiritual wayfaring. (Stanza 50)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, te lolu tax na Seriñ yu mag yi dëgëral yoon wi ci xam-xamum fiqh sa sùnek. (Wers 50)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ سِرِجْ يُ مَجْ يِ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ يُونْ وِ سِ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ سَ سُنِكْ [50]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ فَهُوَ النَّهْجُ الْقَوِيمُ الَّذِي سَارَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَفُ الصَّالِحُ. [51]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm fahuwan-nahjul-qawīmul-ladhī sāra ‘alayhis-salafuṣ-ṣāliḥ. (51)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, for it is the straight approach upon which the righteous predecessors walked. (Stanza 51)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, moom mooy yoon wu jub wi ñi jiitu woon té rafet doxé woon ci kaw suuf. (Wers 51)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ مُومْ مُويْ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وِ نْيِ جِيتُ وُونْ تِ رَفِتْ دُخِ وُونْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [51]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ وَمَنْ خَالَفَ هَذَا الْأَصْلَ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ الْأَقْوَمِ. [52]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām wa man khālafa hādhal-aṣla faqad ḍalla ‘aniṣ-ṣirāṭil-aqwam. (52)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, and whoever opposes this foundation has strayed from the most upright path. (Stanza 52)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, te ku moy yoon mii dëg dëg sotti na ca yoonu mbugal yu rëy. (Wers 52)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ تِ كُ مُيْ يُونْ مِي دِࣺجّ دِٜجّ سُتِّ نَ سَ يُونُ مْبُجَلْ يُ رِي [52]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ لِأَنَّ مَقْصَدَ الْقَوْمِ هُوَ تَصْفِيَةُ الْقَلْبِ لِتَحْقِيقِ كَمَالِ الْإِخْلَاصِ. [53]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār li'anna maqṣadal-qawmi huwa taṣfiyatul-qalbi li-taḥqīqi kamālil-ikhlāṣ. (53)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, because the purpose of the masters is purification of the heart to achieve perfection of sincerity. (Stanza 53)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, ndax li Seriñ yi bëgg rekk mooy laabal xol yi ngir dëgëral sellal gu mat. (Wers 53)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ نْدَخْ لِ سِرِجْ يِ بِجِّ رِكْ مُويْ لَابَلْ خُلْ يِ نْجِرْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سِلَّلْ جُ مَتْ [53]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ شِفَاءٌ لِلصُّدُورِ وَنَجَاةٌ لِلنُّفُوسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ. [54]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' wa fī dhālika shifā'un liṣ-ṣudūri wa najātun lin-nufūsi yawmal-qiyāmah. (54)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, and in that is healing for the breasts and salvation for the souls on the Day of Resurrection. (Stanza 54)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, te ca lolu la saafara nekk ngir xol yi ak ndam ca bisu àllaxira. (Wers 54)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَافَرَ نِكَّ نْجِرْ خُلْ يِ اَكْ نْدَمْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ [54]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ فَالْزَمْ مَجَالِسَ الْعِلْمِ وَالذِّكْرِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَنْوَارَ السَّنِيَّةَ. [55]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq fal-zam majālisal-‘ilmi wadh-dhikri li-tanālal-anwāras-saniyyah. (55)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, so cling to the assemblies of knowledge and remembrance to receive elevated lights. (Stanza 55)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, kon sàmmeel sa bopp jàng ak tudd Yàlla ngir nga am leeraay yu rëy. (Wers 55)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ كُنْ سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ جَنْجْ اَكْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي [55]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ وَلَا تَكُنْ مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ الَّذِينَ يَطْلُبُونَ الدُّنْيَا بِالدِّينِ. [56]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah wa lā takun minal-ghāfilīnal-ladhīna yaṭlubūnad-dunyā bid-dīn. (56)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, and do not be among the heedless who seek this worldly life through religion. (Stanza 56)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, te bul bokk ci ñi bëgg àdduna te di jaaye seen diine mbir yu néew. (Wers 56)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ تِ بُلْ بُكِّ سِ نْيِ بِجِّ اَدُّنَ تِ دِ جَايِ سِينْ دِينِ مْبِرْ يُ نِيوْ [56]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ فَالْحَقُّ أَبْلَجُ وَالْبَاطِلُ لَجْلَجٌ وَالْعَاقِلُ مَنْ يَتَّبِعُ الدَّلِيلَ. [57]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah fal-ḥaqqu ablaju wal-bāṭilu lajlaju wal-‘āqilu man yattabi‘ud-dalīl. (57)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, for truth is clear, falsehood is confused, and the wise person is one who follows evidence. (Stanza 57)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, ndax dëgg féeñ na te leen dëngël féeñ na, te ku am xel mooy topp tére yi. (Wers 57)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ نْدَخْ دِٜجّ فِيرْ نَ تِ لِينْ دِٜnْجِٜlْ فِيرْ نَ تِ كُ اَمْ خَلْ مُويْ تُپْ تِيرِ يِ [57]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ وَبِذَلِكَ نَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْقَبُولَ وَالثَّبَاتَ عَلَى الصِّرَاطِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ. [58]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq wa bi-dhālika nas'alullāhal-qabūla wat-thabāta ‘alāṣ-ṣirāṭil-mustaqīm. (58)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, and with that we ask Allah for acceptance and firmness upon the straight path. (Stanza 58)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, te lolu la nuy ñaane sa Boroom mu nangu te dëgëral nu ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 58)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ تِ لُلُ لَ نُيْ نْيَانِ سَ بُرُومْ مُ نَنْجُ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [58]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ لِيَكُونَ عَمَلُنَا كُلُّهُ خَالِصاً لِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ بِلَا رِيَاءٍ. [59]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm li-yakūna ‘amalunā kulluhu khāliṣan li-wajhihil-karīmi bilā riyā'. (59)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, so that all of our work is purely for His Noble Countenance, without ostentation. (Stanza 59)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, ngir sunu liggeey yépp sell ngir Moom rekk, andul ak rëy walla féeñ. (Wers 59)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ نْجِرْ سُنُ لِجِي يِٚpْ سِلْ نْجِرْ مُومْ رِكْ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ رِي وَلَّ فِيرْ [59]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ فَهَذَا هُوَ الطَّرِيقُ الْوَاضِحُ الَّذِي لَا مِرَاءَ فِيهِ وَلَا غُمُوضَ. [60]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām fahādhā huwat-ṭarīqul-wāḍiḥul-ladhī lā mirā'a fīhi wa lā ghumūḍ. (60)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, for this is the clear path in which there is no dispute or ambiguity. (Stanza 60)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, ndax jii mooy yoon wu féeñ wi amul lëndëm walla wax yu dëng. (Wers 60)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ نْدَخْ جِي مُويْ يُونْ وُ فِيرْ وِ اَمُلْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ وَلَّ وَخْ يُ دِٜnْجْ [60]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى فَهْمِ ذَلِكَ لِتَسْلَمَ مِنَ الِانْحِرَافِ وَالْفِتَنِ. [61]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā fahmi dhālika li-taslama minal-inḥirāfi wal-fitan. (61)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, so be diligent in understanding that to remain safe from deviation and trials. (Stanza 61)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, fexeel ba xam lolu ngir nga dagan ci bépp dëngël walla mbugal. (Wers 61)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ فِخِيلْ بَ خَمْ لُلُ نْجِرْ نْجَ دَجَنْ سِ بِيقْ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ [61]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ وَلَا تَلْتَفِتْ إِلَى أَقْوَالِ مَنْ حُرِمَ رَائِحَةَ الْعِرْفَانِ وَالْأَدَبِ. [62]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' wa lā taltafit ilā aqwāli man ḥurima rā'iḥatal-‘irfāni wal-adab. (62)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, and pay no attention to the claims of whoever is deprived of the scent of gnosis and etiquette. (Stanza 62)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, te bul xool kàdduy keneen ku andul ak sutura walla xam-xamum ruu. (Wers 62)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ تِ بُلْ خُولْ كَدُّيْ كِنِينْ كُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ سُتُرَ وَلَّ خَمْ خَمُمْ رُو [62]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ وَبِهَذَا يَظْهَرُ لَكَ بُطْلَانُ شُبَهَاتِ الْجَاحِدِينَ الْأَغْمَارِ. [63]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq wa bi-hādhā yaẓharu laka buṭlānu shubahātil-jāḥidīnal-aghmār. (63)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, and by this, the falsehood of the doubts of ignorant deniers becomes manifest to you. (Stanza 63)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, te ci lolu la lay féeñé ne waxi koñkat yi lu daganadi la te sellul. (Wers 63)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ لَيْ فِيرْيِ نِ وَخِ كُنْكَتْ يِ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ سِلُّلْ [63]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ فَالنُّورُ السَّاطِعُ لَا يَحْجِبُهُ غُبَارُ التَّعَصُّبِ وَالْأَهْوَاءِ. [64]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah fal-nūrus-sāṭi‘u lā yaḥjibuhu ghubārut-ta‘aṣṣubi wal-ahwā'. (64)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, for the shining light is not veiled by the dust of fanaticism and personal whims. (Stanza 64)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, ndax leeraay buy féeñ, rëxu dëngël walla mbugal mënul ko laxat. (Wers 64)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ نْدَخْ لِيرَايْ بُيْ فِيرْ رِخُ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ مِࣺنُلْ كُ لَخَتْ [64]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ وَلِذَلِكَ كَانَ الْأَكَابِرُ يَعْتَصِمُونَ بِالْفِقْهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ دَائِماً. [65]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah wa li-dhālika kānal-akābiru ya‘taṣimūna bil-fiqhi fis-sulūki dā'imā. (65)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, therefore, the great masters always held fast to jurisprudence in their spiritual wayfaring. (Stanza 65)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, te lolu tax na Seriñ yu mag yi dëgëral yoon wi ci xam-xamum fiqh sa sùnek. (Wers 65)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ سِرِجْ يُ مَجْ يِ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ يُونْ وِ سِ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ سَ سُنِكْ [65]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ فَهُوَ النَّهْجُ الْقَوِيمُ الَّذِي سَارَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَفُ الصَّالِحُ. [66]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq fahuwan-nahjul-qawīmul-ladhī sāra ‘alayhis-salafuṣ-ṣāliḥ. (66)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, for it is the straight approach upon which the righteous predecessors walked. (Stanza 66)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, moom mooy yoon wu jub wi ñi jiitu woon té rafet doxé woon ci kaw suuf. (Wers 66)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ مُومْ مُويْ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وِ نْيِ جِيتُ وُونْ تِ رَفِتْ دُخِ وُونْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [66]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ وَمَنْ خَالَفَ هَذَا الْأَصْلَ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ الْأَقْوَمِ. [67]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm wa man khālafa hādhal-aṣla faqad ḍalla ‘aniṣ-ṣirāṭil-aqwam. (67)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, and whoever opposes this foundation has strayed from the most upright path. (Stanza 67)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, te ku moy yoon mii dëg dëg sotti na ca yoonu mbugal yu rëy. (Wers 67)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ تِ كُ مُيْ يُونْ مِي دِࣺجّ دِٜجّ سُتِّ نَ سَ يُونُ مْبُجَلْ يُ رِي [67]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ لِأَنَّ مَقْصَدَ الْقَوْمِ هُوَ تَصْفِيَةُ الْقَلْبِ لِتَحْقِيقِ كَمَالِ الْإِخْلَاصِ. [68]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām li'anna maqṣadal-qawmi huwa taṣfiyatul-qalbi li-taḥqīqi kamālil-ikhlāṣ. (68)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, because the purpose of the masters is purification of the heart to achieve perfection of sincerity. (Stanza 68)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, ndax li Seriñ yi bëgg rekk mooy laabal xol yi ngir dëgëral sellal gu mat. (Wers 68)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ نْدَخْ لِ سِرِجْ يِ بِجِّ رِكْ مُويْ لَابَلْ خُلْ يِ نْجِرْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سِلَّلْ جُ مَتْ [68]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ شِفَاءٌ لِلصُّدُورِ وَنَجَاةٌ لِلنُّفُوسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ. [69]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār wa fī dhālika shifā'un liṣ-ṣudūri wa najātun lin-nufūsi yawmal-qiyāmah. (69)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, and in that is healing for the breasts and salvation for the souls on the Day of Resurrection. (Stanza 69)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, te ca lolu la saafara nekk ngir xol yi ak ndam ca bisu àllaxira. (Wers 69)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَافَرَ نِكَّ نْجِرْ خُلْ يِ اَكْ نْدَمْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ [69]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ فَالْزَمْ مَجَالِسَ الْعِلْمِ وَالذِّكْرِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَنْوَارَ السَّنِيَّةَ. [70]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' fal-zam majālisal-‘ilmi wadh-dhikri li-tanālal-anwāras-saniyyah. (70)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, so cling to the assemblies of knowledge and remembrance to receive elevated lights. (Stanza 70)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, kon sàmmeel sa bopp jàng ak tudd Yàlla ngir nga am leeraay yu rëy. (Wers 70)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ كُنْ سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ جَنْجْ اَكْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي [70]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ وَلَا تَكُنْ مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ الَّذِينَ يَطْلُبُونَ الدُّنْيَا بِالدِّينِ. [71]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq wa lā takun minal-ghāfilīnal-ladhīna yaṭlubūnad-dunyā bid-dīn. (71)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, and do not be among the heedless who seek this worldly life through religion. (Stanza 71)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, te bul bokk ci ñi bëgg àdduna te di jaaye seen diine mbir yu néew. (Wers 71)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ تِ بُلْ بُكِّ سِ نْيِ بِجِّ اَدُّنَ تِ دِ جَايِ سِينْ دِينِ مْبِرْ يُ نِيوْ [71]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ فَالْحَقُّ أَبْلَجُ وَالْبَاطِلُ لَجْلَجٌ وَالْعَاقِلُ مَنْ يَتَّبِعُ الدَّلِيلَ. [72]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah fal-ḥaqqu ablaju wal-bāṭilu lajlaju wal-‘āqilu man yattabi‘ud-dalīl. (72)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, for truth is clear, falsehood is confused, and the wise person is one who follows evidence. (Stanza 72)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, ndax dëgg féeñ na te leen dëngël féeñ na, te ku am xel mooy topp tére yi. (Wers 72)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ نْدَخْ دِٜجّ فِيرْ نَ تِ لِينْ دِٜnْجِٜlْ فِيرْ نَ تِ كُ اَمْ خَلْ مُويْ تُپْ تِيرِ يِ [72]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ وَبِذَلِكَ نَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْقَبُولَ وَالثَّبَاتَ عَلَى الصِّرَاطِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ. [73]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah wa bi-dhālika nas'alullāhal-qabūla wat-thabāta ‘alāṣ-ṣirāṭil-mustaqīm. (73)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, and with that we ask Allah for acceptance and firmness upon the straight path. (Stanza 73)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, te lolu la nuy ñaane sa Boroom mu nangu te dëgëral nu ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 73)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ تِ لُلُ لَ نُيْ نْيَانِ سَ بُرُومْ مُ نَنْجُ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [73]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ لِيَكُونَ عَمَلُنَا كُلُّهُ خَالِصاً لِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ بِلَا رِيَاءٍ. [74]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq li-yakūna ‘amalunā kulluhu khāliṣan li-wajhihil-karīmi bilā riyā'. (74)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, so that all of our work is purely for His Noble Countenance, without ostentation. (Stanza 74)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, ngir sunu liggeey yépp sell ngir Moom rekk, andul ak rëy walla féeñ. (Wers 74)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ نْجِرْ سُنُ لِجِي يِٚpْ سِلْ نْجِرْ مُومْ رِكْ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ رِي وَلَّ فِيرْ [74]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ فَهَذَا هُوَ الطَّرِيقُ الْوَاضِحُ الَّذِي لَا مِرَاءَ فِيهِ وَلَا غُمُوضَ. [75]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm fahādhā huwat-ṭarīqul-wāḍiḥul-ladhī lā mirā'a fīhi wa lā ghumūḍ. (75)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, for this is the clear path in which there is no dispute or ambiguity. (Stanza 75)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, ndax jii mooy yoon wu féeñ wi amul lëndëm walla wax yu dëng. (Wers 75)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ نْدَخْ جِي مُويْ يُونْ وُ فِيرْ وِ اَمُلْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ وَلَّ وَخْ يُ دِٜnْجْ [75]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى فَهْمِ ذَلِكَ لِتَسْلَمَ مِنَ الِانْحِرَافِ وَالْفِتَنِ. [76]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā fahmi dhālika li-taslama minal-inḥirāfi wal-fitan. (76)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, so be diligent in understanding that to remain safe from deviation and trials. (Stanza 76)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, fexeel ba xam lolu ngir nga dagan ci bépp dëngël walla mbugal. (Wers 76)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ فِخِيلْ بَ خَمْ لُلُ نْجِرْ نْجَ دَجَنْ سِ بِيقْ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ [76]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ وَلَا تَلْتَفِتْ إِلَى أَقْوَالِ مَنْ حُرِمَ رَائِحَةَ الْعِرْفَانِ وَالْأَدَبِ. [77]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār wa lā taltafit ilā aqwāli man ḥurima rā'iḥatal-‘irfāni wal-adab. (77)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, and pay no attention to the claims of whoever is deprived of the scent of gnosis and etiquette. (Stanza 77)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, te bul xool kàdduy keneen ku andul ak sutura walla xam-xamum ruu. (Wers 77)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ تِ بُلْ خُولْ كَدُّيْ كِنِينْ كُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ سُتُرَ وَلَّ خَمْ خَمُمْ رُو [77]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا يَظْهَرُ لَكَ بُطْلَانُ شُبَهَاتِ الْجَاحِدِينَ الْأَغْمَارِ. [78]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' wa bi-hādhā yaẓharu laka buṭlānu shubahātil-jāḥidīnal-aghmār. (78)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, and by this, the falsehood of the doubts of ignorant deniers becomes manifest to you. (Stanza 78)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, te ci lolu la lay féeñé ne waxi koñkat yi lu daganadi la te sellul. (Wers 78)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ لَيْ فِيرْيِ نِ وَخِ كُنْكَتْ يِ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ سِلُّلْ [78]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ فَالنُّورُ السَّاطِعُ لَا يَحْجِبُهُ غُبَارُ التَّعَصُّبِ وَالْأَهْوَاءِ. [79]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq fal-nūrus-sāṭi‘u lā yaḥjibuhu ghubārut-ta‘aṣṣubi wal-ahwā'. (79)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, for the shining light is not veiled by the dust of fanaticism and personal whims. (Stanza 79)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, ndax leeraay buy féeñ, rëxu dëngël walla mbugal mënul ko laxat. (Wers 79)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ نْدَخْ لِيرَايْ بُيْ فِيرْ رِخُ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ مِࣺنُلْ كُ لَخَتْ [79]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ وَلِذَلِكَ كَانَ الْأَكَابِرُ يَعْتَصِمُونَ بِالْفِقْهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ دَائِماً. [80]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah wa li-dhālika kānal-akābiru ya‘taṣimūna bil-fiqhi fis-sulūki dā'imā. (80)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, therefore, the great masters always held fast to jurisprudence in their spiritual wayfaring. (Stanza 80)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, te lolu tax na Seriñ yu mag yi dëgëral yoon wi ci xam-xamum fiqh sa sùnek. (Wers 80)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ سِرِجْ يُ مَجْ يِ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ يُونْ وِ سِ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ سَ سُنِكْ [80]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ فَهُوَ النَّهْجُ الْقَوِيمُ الَّذِي سَارَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَفُ الصَّالِحُ. [81]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah fahuwan-nahjul-qawīmul-ladhī sāra ‘alayhis-salafuṣ-ṣāliḥ. (81)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, for it is the straight approach upon which the righteous predecessors walked. (Stanza 81)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, moom mooy yoon wu jub wi ñi jiitu woon té rafet doxé woon ci kaw suuf. (Wers 81)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ مُومْ مُويْ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وِ نْيِ جِيتُ وُونْ تِ رَفِتْ دُخِ وُونْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [81]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ وَمَنْ خَالَفَ هَذَا الْأَصْلَ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ الْأَقْوَمِ. [82]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq wa man khālafa hādhal-aṣla faqad ḍalla ‘aniṣ-ṣirāṭil-aqwam. (82)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, and whoever opposes this foundation has strayed from the most upright path. (Stanza 82)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, te ku moy yoon mii dëg dëg sotti na ca yoonu mbugal yu rëy. (Wers 82)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ تِ كُ مُيْ يُونْ مِي دِࣺجّ دِٜجّ سُتِّ نَ سَ يُونُ مْبُجَلْ يُ رِي [82]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ لِأَنَّ مَقْصَدَ الْقَوْمِ هُوَ تَصْفِيَةُ الْقَلْبِ لِتَحْقِيقِ كَمَالِ الْإِخْلَاصِ. [83]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm li'anna maqṣadal-qawmi huwa taṣfiyatul-qalbi li-taḥqīqi kamālil-ikhlāṣ. (83)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, because the purpose of the masters is purification of the heart to achieve perfection of sincerity. (Stanza 83)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, ndax li Seriñ yi bëgg rekk mooy laabal xol yi ngir dëgëral sellal gu mat. (Wers 83)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ نْدَخْ لِ سِرِجْ يِ بِجِّ رِكْ مُويْ لَابَلْ خُلْ يِ نْجِرْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سِلَّلْ جُ مَتْ [83]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ شِفَاءٌ لِلصُّدُورِ وَنَجَاةٌ لِلنُّفُوسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ. [84]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām wa fī dhālika shifā'un liṣ-ṣudūri wa najātun lin-nufūsi yawmal-qiyāmah. (84)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, and in that is healing for the breasts and salvation for the souls on the Day of Resurrection. (Stanza 84)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, te ca lolu la saafara nekk ngir xol yi ak ndam ca bisu àllaxira. (Wers 84)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَافَرَ نِكَّ نْجِرْ خُلْ يِ اَكْ نْدَمْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ [84]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ فَالْزَمْ مَجَالِسَ الْعِلْمِ وَالذِّكْرِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَنْوَارَ السَّنِيَّةَ. [85]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār fal-zam majālisal-‘ilmi wadh-dhikri li-tanālal-anwāras-saniyyah. (85)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, so cling to the assemblies of knowledge and remembrance to receive elevated lights. (Stanza 85)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, kon sàmmeel sa bopp jàng ak tudd Yàlla ngir nga am leeraay yu rëy. (Wers 85)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ كُنْ سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ جَنْجْ اَكْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي [85]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ وَلَا تَكُنْ مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ الَّذِينَ يَطْلُبُونَ الدُّنْيَا بِالدِّينِ. [86]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' wa lā takun minal-ghāfilīnal-ladhīna yaṭlubūnad-dunyā bid-dīn. (86)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, and do not be among the heedless who seek this worldly life through religion. (Stanza 86)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, te bul bokk ci ñi bëgg àdduna te di jaaye seen diine mbir yu néew. (Wers 86)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ تِ بُلْ بُكِّ سِ نْيِ بِجِّ اَدُّنَ تِ دِ جَايِ سِينْ دِينِ مْبِرْ يُ نِيوْ [86]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ فَالْحَقُّ أَبْلَجُ وَالْبَاطِلُ لَجْلَجٌ وَالْعَاقِلُ مَنْ يَتَّبِعُ الدَّلِيلَ. [87]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq fal-ḥaqqu ablaju wal-bāṭilu lajlaju wal-‘āqilu man yattabi‘ud-dalīl. (87)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, for truth is clear, falsehood is confused, and the wise person is one who follows evidence. (Stanza 87)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, ndax dëgg féeñ na te leen dëngël féeñ na, te ku am xel mooy topp tére yi. (Wers 87)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ نْدَخْ دِٜجّ فِيرْ نَ تِ لِينْ دِٜnْجِٜlْ فِيرْ نَ تِ كُ اَمْ خَلْ مُويْ تُپْ تِيرِ يِ [87]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ وَبِذَلِكَ نَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْقَبُولَ وَالثَّبَاتَ عَلَى الصِّرَاطِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ. [88]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah wa bi-dhālika nas'alullāhal-qabūla wat-thabāta ‘alāṣ-ṣirāṭil-mustaqīm. (88)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, and with that we ask Allah for acceptance and firmness upon the straight path. (Stanza 88)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, te lolu la nuy ñaane sa Boroom mu nangu te dëgëral nu ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 88)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ تِ لُلُ لَ نُيْ نْيَانِ سَ بُرُومْ مُ نَنْجُ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [88]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ لِيَكُونَ عَمَلُنَا كُلُّهُ خَالِصاً لِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ بِلَا رِيَاءٍ. [89]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah li-yakūna ‘amalunā kulluhu khāliṣan li-wajhihil-karīmi bilā riyā'. (89)
