englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, so that all of our work is purely for His Noble Countenance, without ostentation. (Stanza 89)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, ngir sunu liggeey yépp sell ngir Moom rekk, andul ak rëy walla féeñ. (Wers 89)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ نْجِرْ سُنُ لِجِي يِٚpْ سِلْ نْجِرْ مُومْ رِكْ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ رِي وَلَّ فِيرْ [89]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ فَهَذَا هُوَ الطَّرِيقُ الْوَاضِحُ الَّذِي لَا مِرَاءَ فِيهِ وَلَا غُمُوضَ. [90]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq fahādhā huwat-ṭarīqul-wāḍiḥul-ladhī lā mirā'a fīhi wa lā ghumūḍ. (90)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, for this is the clear path in which there is no dispute or ambiguity. (Stanza 90)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, ndax jii mooy yoon wu féeñ wi amul lëndëm walla wax yu dëng. (Wers 90)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ نْدَخْ جِي مُويْ يُونْ وُ فِيرْ وِ اَمُلْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ وَلَّ وَخْ يُ دِٜnْجْ [90]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى فَهْمِ ذَلِكَ لِتَسْلَمَ مِنَ الِانْحِرَافِ وَالْفِتَنِ. [91]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā fahmi dhālika li-taslama minal-inḥirāfi wal-fitan. (91)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, so be diligent in understanding that to remain safe from deviation and trials. (Stanza 91)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, fexeel ba xam lolu ngir nga dagan ci bépp dëngël walla mbugal. (Wers 91)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ فِخِيلْ بَ خَمْ لُلُ نْجِرْ نْجَ دَجَنْ سِ بِيقْ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ [91]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ وَلَا تَلْتَفِتْ إِلَى أَقْوَالِ مَنْ حُرِمَ رَائِحَةَ الْعِرْفَانِ وَالْأَدَبِ. [92]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām wa lā taltafit ilā aqwāli man ḥurima rā'iḥatal-‘irfāni wal-adab. (92)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, and pay no attention to the claims of whoever is deprived of the scent of gnosis and etiquette. (Stanza 92)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, te bul xool kàdduy keneen ku andul ak sutura walla xam-xamum ruu. (Wers 92)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ تِ بُلْ خُولْ كَدُّيْ كِنِينْ كُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ سُتُرَ وَلَّ خَمْ خَمُمْ رُو [92]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ وَبِهَذَا يَظْهَرُ لَكَ بُطْلَانُ شُبَهَاتِ الْجَاحِدِينَ الْأَغْمَارِ. [93]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār wa bi-hādhā yaẓharu laka buṭlānu shubahātil-jāḥidīnal-aghmār. (93)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, and by this, the falsehood of the doubts of ignorant deniers becomes manifest to you. (Stanza 93)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, te ci lolu la lay féeñé ne waxi koñkat yi lu daganadi la te sellul. (Wers 93)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ لَيْ فِيرْيِ نِ وَخِ كُنْكَتْ يِ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ سِلُّلْ [93]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ فَالنُّورُ السَّاطِعُ لَا يَحْجِبُهُ غُبَارُ التَّعَصُّبِ وَالْأَهْوَاءِ. [94]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' fal-nūrus-sāṭi‘u lā yaḥjibuhu ghubārut-ta‘aṣṣubi wal-ahwā'. (94)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, for the shining light is not veiled by the dust of fanaticism and personal whims. (Stanza 94)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, ndax leeraay buy féeñ, rëxu dëngël walla mbugal mënul ko laxat. (Wers 94)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ نْدَخْ لِيرَايْ بُيْ فِيرْ رِخُ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ مِࣺنُلْ كُ لَخَتْ [94]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ وَلِذَلِكَ كَانَ الْأَكَابِرُ يَعْتَصِمُونَ بِالْفِقْهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ دَائِماً. [95]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq wa li-dhālika kānal-akābiru ya‘taṣimūna bil-fiqhi fis-sulūki dā'imā. (95)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, therefore, the great masters always held fast to jurisprudence in their spiritual wayfaring. (Stanza 95)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, te lolu tax na Seriñ yu mag yi dëgëral yoon wi ci xam-xamum fiqh sa sùnek. (Wers 95)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ سِرِجْ يُ مَجْ يِ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ يُونْ وِ سِ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ سَ سُنِكْ [95]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ فَهُوَ النَّهْجُ الْقَوِيمُ الَّذِي سَارَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَفُ الصَّالِحُ. [96]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah fahuwan-nahjul-qawīmul-ladhī sāra ‘alayhis-salafuṣ-ṣāliḥ. (96)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, for it is the straight approach upon which the righteous predecessors walked. (Stanza 96)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, moom mooy yoon wu jub wi ñi jiitu woon té rafet doxé woon ci kaw suuf. (Wers 96)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ مُومْ مُويْ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وِ نْيِ جِيتُ وُونْ تِ رَفِتْ دُخِ وُونْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [96]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ وَمَنْ خَالَفَ هَذَا الْأَصْلَ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ الْأَقْوَمِ. [97]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah wa man khālafa hādhal-aṣla faqad ḍalla ‘aniṣ-ṣirāṭil-aqwam. (97)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, and whoever opposes this foundation has strayed from the most upright path. (Stanza 97)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, te ku moy yoon mii dëg dëg sotti na ca yoonu mbugal yu rëy. (Wers 97)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ تِ كُ مُيْ يُونْ مِي دِࣺجّ دِٜجّ سُتِّ نَ سَ يُونُ مْبُجَلْ يُ رِي [97]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ لِأَنَّ مَقْصَدَ الْقَوْمِ هُوَ تَصْفِيَةُ الْقَلْبِ لِتَحْقِيقِ كَمَالِ الْإِخْلَاصِ. [98]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq li'anna maqṣadal-qawmi huwa taṣfiyatul-qalbi li-taḥqīqi kamālil-ikhlāṣ. (98)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, because the purpose of the masters is purification of the heart to achieve perfection of sincerity. (Stanza 98)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, ndax li Seriñ yi bëgg rekk mooy laabal xol yi ngir dëgëral sellal gu mat. (Wers 98)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ نْدَخْ لِ سِرِجْ يِ بِجِّ رِكْ مُويْ لَابَلْ خُلْ يِ نْجِرْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سِلَّلْ جُ مَتْ [98]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ شِفَاءٌ لِلصُّدُورِ وَنَجَاةٌ لِلنُّفُوسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ. [99]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm wa fī dhālika shifā'un liṣ-ṣudūri wa najātun lin-nufūsi yawmal-qiyāmah. (99)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, and in that is healing for the breasts and salvation for the souls on the Day of Resurrection. (Stanza 99)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, te ca lolu la saafara nekk ngir xol yi ak ndam ca bisu àllaxira. (Wers 99)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَافَرَ نِكَّ نْجِرْ خُلْ يِ اَكْ نْدَمْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ [99]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ فَالْزَمْ مَجَالِسَ الْعِلْمِ وَالذِّكْرِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَنْوَارَ السَّنِيَّةَ. [100]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām fal-zam majālisal-‘ilmi wadh-dhikri li-tanālal-anwāras-saniyyah. (100)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, so cling to the assemblies of knowledge and remembrance to receive elevated lights. (Stanza 100)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, kon sàmmeel sa bopp jàng ak tudd Yàlla ngir nga am leeraay yu rëy. (Wers 100)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ كُنْ سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ جَنْجْ اَكْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي [100]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ وَلَا تَكُنْ مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ الَّذِينَ يَطْلُبُونَ الدُّنْيَا بِالدِّينِ. [101]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār wa lā takun minal-ghāfilīnal-ladhīna yaṭlubūnad-dunyā bid-dīn. (101)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, and do not be among the heedless who seek this worldly life through religion. (Stanza 101)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, te bul bokk ci ñi bëgg àdduna te di jaaye seen diine mbir yu néew. (Wers 101)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ تِ بُلْ بُكِّ سِ نْيِ بِجِّ اَدُّنَ تِ دِ جَايِ سِينْ دِينِ مْبِرْ يُ نِيوْ [101]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ فَالْحَقُّ أَبْلَجُ وَالْبَاطِلُ لَجْلَجٌ وَالْعَاقِلُ مَنْ يَتَّبِعُ الدَّلِيلَ. [102]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' fal-ḥaqqu ablaju wal-bāṭilu lajlaju wal-‘āqilu man yattabi‘ud-dalīl. (102)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, for truth is clear, falsehood is confused, and the wise person is one who follows evidence. (Stanza 102)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, ndax dëgg féeñ na te leen dëngël féeñ na, te ku am xel mooy topp tére yi. (Wers 102)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ نْدَخْ دِٜجّ فِيرْ نَ تِ لِينْ دِٜnْجِٜlْ فِيرْ نَ تِ كُ اَمْ خَلْ مُويْ تُپْ تِيرِ يِ [102]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ وَبِذَلِكَ نَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْقَبُولَ وَالثَّبَاتَ عَلَى الصِّرَاطِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ. [103]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq wa bi-dhālika nas'alullāhal-qabūla wat-thabāta ‘alāṣ-ṣirāṭil-mustaqīm. (103)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, and with that we ask Allah for acceptance and firmness upon the straight path. (Stanza 103)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, te lolu la nuy ñaane sa Boroom mu nangu te dëgëral nu ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 103)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ تِ لُلُ لَ نُيْ نْيَانِ سَ بُرُومْ مُ نَنْجُ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [103]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ لِيَكُونَ عَمَلُنَا كُلُّهُ خَالِصاً لِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ بِلَا رِيَاءٍ. [104]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah li-yakūna ‘amalunā kulluhu khāliṣan li-wajhihil-karīmi bilā riyā'. (104)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, so that all of our work is purely for His Noble Countenance, without ostentation. (Stanza 104)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, ngir sunu liggeey yépp sell ngir Moom rekk, andul ak rëy walla féeñ. (Wers 104)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ نْجِرْ سُنُ لِجِي يِٚpْ سِلْ نْجِرْ مُومْ رِكْ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ رِي وَلَّ فِيرْ [104]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ فَهَذَا هُوَ الطَّرِيقُ الْوَاضِحُ الَّذِي لَا مِرَاءَ فِيهِ وَلَا غُمُوضَ. [105]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah fahādhā huwat-ṭarīqul-wāḍiḥul-ladhī lā mirā'a fīhi wa lā ghumūḍ. (105)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, for this is the clear path in which there is no dispute or ambiguity. (Stanza 105)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, ndax jii mooy yoon wu féeñ wi amul lëndëm walla wax yu dëng. (Wers 105)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ نْدَخْ جِي مُويْ يُونْ وُ فِيرْ وِ اَمُلْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ وَلَّ وَخْ يُ دِٜnْجْ [105]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى فَهْمِ ذَلِكَ لِتَسْلَمَ مِنَ الِانْحِرَافِ وَالْفِتَنِ. [106]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā fahmi dhālika li-taslama minal-inḥirāfi wal-fitan. (106)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, so be diligent in understanding that to remain safe from deviation and trials. (Stanza 106)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, fexeel ba xam lolu ngir nga dagan ci bépp dëngël walla mbugal. (Wers 106)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ فِخِيلْ بَ خَمْ لُلُ نْجِرْ نْجَ دَجَنْ سِ بِيقْ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ [106]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ وَلَا تَلْتَفِتْ إِلَى أَقْوَالِ مَنْ حُرِمَ رَائِحَةَ الْعِرْفَانِ وَالْأَدَبِ. [107]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm wa lā taltafit ilā aqwāli man ḥurima rā'iḥatal-‘irfāni wal-adab. (107)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, and pay no attention to the claims of whoever is deprived of the scent of gnosis and etiquette. (Stanza 107)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, te bul xool kàdduy keneen ku andul ak sutura walla xam-xamum ruu. (Wers 107)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ تِ بُلْ خُولْ كَدُّيْ كِنِينْ كُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ سُتُرَ وَلَّ خَمْ خَمُمْ رُو [107]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ وَبِهَذَا يَظْهَرُ لَكَ بُطْلَانُ شُبَهَاتِ الْجَاحِدِينَ الْأَغْمَارِ. [108]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām wa bi-hādhā yaẓharu laka buṭlānu shubahātil-jāḥidīnal-aghmār. (108)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, and by this, the falsehood of the doubts of ignorant deniers becomes manifest to you. (Stanza 108)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, te ci lolu la lay féeñé ne waxi koñkat yi lu daganadi la te sellul. (Wers 108)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ تِ سِ لُلُ لَ لَيْ فِيرْيِ نِ وَخِ كُنْكَتْ يِ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ سِلُّلْ [108]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ فَالنُّورُ السَّاطِعُ لَا يَحْجِبُهُ غُبَارُ التَّعَصُّبِ وَالْأَهْوَاءِ. [109]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār fal-nūrus-sāṭi‘u lā yaḥjibuhu ghubārut-ta‘aṣṣubi wal-ahwā'. (109)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, for the shining light is not veiled by the dust of fanaticism and personal whims. (Stanza 109)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, ndax leeraay buy féeñ, rëxu dëngël walla mbugal mënul ko laxat. (Wers 109)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ نْدَخْ لِيرَايْ بُيْ فِيرْ رِخُ دِࣺنْجِࣺلْ وَلَّ مْبُجَلْ مِࣺنُلْ كُ لَخَتْ [109]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ وَلِذَلِكَ كَانَ الْأَكَابِرُ يَعْتَصِمُونَ بِالْفِقْهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ دَائِماً. [110]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' wa li-dhālika kānal-akābiru ya‘taṣimūna bil-fiqhi fis-sulūki dā'imā. (110)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, therefore, the great masters always held fast to jurisprudence in their spiritual wayfaring. (Stanza 110)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, te lolu tax na Seriñ yu mag yi dëgëral yoon wi ci xam-xamum fiqh sa sùnek. (Wers 110)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ سِرِجْ يُ مَجْ يِ دِࣺجِࣺرَلْ يُونْ وِ سِ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ سَ سُنِكْ [110]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ فَهُوَ النَّهْجُ الْقَوِيمُ الَّذِي سَارَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَفُ الصَّالِحُ. [111]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq fahuwan-nahjul-qawīmul-ladhī sāra ‘alayhis-salafuṣ-ṣāliḥ. (111)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, for it is the straight approach upon which the righteous predecessors walked. (Stanza 111)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, moom mooy yoon wu jub wi ñi jiitu woon té rafet doxé woon ci kaw suuf. (Wers 111)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ مُومْ مُويْ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وِ نْيِ جِيتُ وُونْ تِ رَفِتْ دُخِ وُونْ سِ كَوْ سُوفْ [111]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ وَمَنْ خَالَفَ هَذَا الْأَصْلَ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ عَنِ الصِّرَاطِ الْأَقْوَمِ. [112]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah wa man khālafa hādhal-aṣla faqad ḍalla ‘aniṣ-ṣirāṭil-aqwam. (112)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, and whoever opposes this foundation has strayed from the most upright path. (Stanza 112)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, te ku moy yoon mii dëg dëg sotti na ca yoonu mbugal yu rëy. (Wers 112)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ تِ كُ مُيْ يُونْ مِي دِࣺجّ دِٜجّ سُتِّ نَ سَ يُونُ مْبُجَلْ يُ رِي [112]

arabicText: إِنَّ طَرِيقَةَ السَّالِكِينَ تَقُومُ عَلَى اتِّبَاعِ الْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ لِأَنَّ مَقْصَدَ الْقَوْمِ هُوَ تَصْفِيَةُ الْقَلْبِ لِتَحْقِيقِ كَمَالِ الْإِخْلَاصِ. [113]
latinTransliteration: Inna ṭarīqatas-sālikīna taqūmu ‘alā ittibā‘il-kitābi was-sunnah li'anna maqṣadal-qawmi huwa taṣfiyatul-qalbi li-taḥqīqi kamālil-ikhlāṣ. (113)
englishTranslation: Indeed, the path of spiritual seekers is established upon adhering to the Book and Sunnah, because the purpose of the masters is purification of the heart to achieve perfection of sincerity. (Stanza 113)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëgg-dëgg yoonu murid yi dafa taxaw ci sàmm Alxuraan ak Sunnah, ndax li Seriñ yi bëgg rekk mooy laabal xol yi ngir dëgëral sellal gu mat. (Wers 113)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يُونُ مُرِيدْ يِ دَفَ تَخَوْ سِ سَمْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ نْدَخْ لِ سِرِجْ يِ بِجِّ رِكْ مُويْ لَابَلْ خُلْ يِ نْجِرْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ سِلَّلْ جُ مَتْ [113]

arabicText: وَمَا يَذْهَبُ إِلَيْهِ الْمُنْكِرُ عَنِ التَّصَوُّفِ هُوَ جَهْلٌ بِالْحَقَائِقِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ شِفَاءٌ لِلصُّدُورِ وَنَجَاةٌ لِلنُّفُوسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ. [114]
latinTransliteration: Wa mā yadhhabu ilayhil-munkiru ‘anit-taṣawwufi huwa jahlun bil-ḥaqā'iq wa fī dhālika shifā'un liṣ-ṣudūri wa najātun lin-nufūsi yawmal-qiyāmah. (114)
englishTranslation: And whatever objections the denier holds against Sufism arise from ignorance of realities, and in that is healing for the breasts and salvation for the souls on the Day of Resurrection. (Stanza 114)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te li koñkat bi wax ci Tasawwuf, jéll-réer rekk la ci dëgg-dëgg yi, te ca lolu la saafara nekk ngir xol yi ak ndam ca bisu àllaxira. (Wers 114)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ لِ كُنْكَتْ بِ وَخْ سِ تَصَوُّفْ جِيلْ رِيرْ رِكْ لَ سِ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجّ يِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ سَافَرَ نِكَّ نْجِرْ خُلْ يِ اَكْ نْدَمْ سَ بِسُ اَلَّخِرَ [114]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ وَالشَّرِيعَةُ تَوْأَمَانِ لَا يَنْفَصِلَانِ فِي مَنْهَجِ الْقَوْمِ فَالْزَمْ مَجَالِسَ الْعِلْمِ وَالذِّكْرِ لِتَنَالَ الْأَنْوَارَ السَّنِيَّةَ. [115]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatu wash-sharī‘atu taw'amāni lā yanfaṣilāni fī manhajil-qawm fal-zam majālisal-‘ilmi wadh-dhikri li-tanālal-anwāras-saniyyah. (115)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth and sacred law are inseparable twins in the methodology of the masters, so cling to the assemblies of knowledge and remembrance to receive elevated lights. (Stanza 115)
wolofTranslationStandard: Ndax dëgg-dëgug ruu ak sariya, ñaar lay and gu kenn du dacc ci yoonu Seriñ yi, kon sàmmeel sa bopp jàng ak tudd Yàlla ngir nga am leeraay yu rëy. (Wers 115)
wolofalAjamiScript: نْدَخْ دِࣺجّ دِࣺجُجْ رُو اَكْ شَرِيعَ نْيَارْ لَيْ اَنْدْ جُ كِنْ دُ دَسِّ سِ يُونُ سِرِجْ يِ كُنْ سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ جَنْجْ اَكْ تُدْ يَٚlَّ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ لِيرَايْ يُ رِي [115]

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِلُزُومِ الْفِقْهِ وَمَذَاهِبِ الْأَئِمَّةِ الْأَرْبَعَةِ الْأَعْلَامِ وَلَا تَكُنْ مِنَ الْغَافِلِينَ الَّذِينَ يَطْلُبُونَ الدُّنْيَا بِالدِّينِ. [116]
latinTransliteration: ‘Alaykum bi-luzūmil-fiqhi wa madhāhibil-a'immatil-arba‘atil-a‘lām wa lā takun minal-ghāfilīnal-ladhīna yaṭlubūnad-dunyā bid-dīn. (116)
englishTranslation: You must cling to jurisprudence and the schools of the four prominent Imams, and do not be among the heedless who seek this worldly life through religion. (Stanza 116)
wolofTranslationStandard: War na ci yeen sàmm xam-xamum fiqh ak ñeenti mboolooy boroom xam-xam yi, te bul bokk ci ñi bëgg àdduna te di jaaye seen diine mbir yu néew. (Wers 116)
wolofalAjamiScript: وَرْ نَ سِ يِينْ سَمْ خَمْ خَمُمْ فِقْهْ اَكْ نْيِينْتِ مْبُولُويْ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يِ تِ بُلْ بُكِّ سِ نْيِ بِجِّ اَدُّنَ تِ دِ جَايِ سِينْ دِينِ مْبِرْ يُ نِيوْ [116]

arabicText: وَالذِّكْرُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ لَيْسَ بِبِدْعَةٍ بَلْ هُوَ ثَابِتٌ بِالْأَخْبَارِ فَالْحَقُّ أَبْلَجُ وَالْبَاطِلُ لَجْلَجٌ وَالْعَاقِلُ مَنْ يَتَّبِعُ الدَّلِيلَ. [117]
latinTransliteration: Wadh-dhikrul-jamā‘iyyu laysa bi-bid‘atin bal huwa thābitun bil-akhbār fal-ḥaqqu ablaju wal-bāṭilu lajlaju wal-‘āqilu man yattabi‘ud-dalīl. (117)
englishTranslation: And collective remembrance of Allah is not an innovation, rather it is established in texts, for truth is clear, falsehood is confused, and the wise person is one who follows evidence. (Stanza 117)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tudd Yàlla and mbooloo du bid‘a, ndax lu wër la ci xabar yi, ndax dëgg féeñ na te leen dëngël féeñ na, te ku am xel mooy topp tére yi. (Wers 117)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تُدْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ مْبُولُو دُ بِدْعَة نْدَخْ لُ وِࣺرْ لَ سِ خَبَرْ يِ نْدَخْ دِٜجّ فِيرْ نَ تِ لِينْ دِٜnْجِٜlْ فِيرْ نَ تِ كُ اَمْ خَلْ مُويْ تُپْ تِيرِ يِ [117]

arabicText: إِنَّ التَّوَسُّلَ بِالْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَالْصَّالِحِينَ جَائِزٌ عِنْدَ جُمْهُورِ الْعُلَمَاءِ وَبِذَلِكَ نَسْأَلُ اللَّهَ الْقَبُولَ وَالثَّبَاتَ عَلَى الصِّرَاطِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ. [118]
latinTransliteration: Innat-tawassula bil-anbiyā'i waṣ-ṣāliḥīna jā'izun ‘inda jumhūril-‘ulamā' wa bi-dhālika nas'alullāhal-qabūla wat-thabāta ‘alāṣ-ṣirāṭil-mustaqīm. (118)
englishTranslation: Indeed, intercession through prophets and the righteous is permissible for the scholars, and with that we ask Allah for acceptance and firmness upon the straight path. (Stanza 118)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te tàwwasul ci Yonent yi ak ñi sell, lu dagan la ci boroom xam-xam yu bari yi, te lolu la nuy ñaane sa Boroom mu nangu te dëgëral nu ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 118)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ تَوَسُّلْ سِ يُونِٜnْتْ يِ اَكْ نْيِ سِلْ لُ دَجَنْ لَ سِ بُرُومْ خَمْ خَمْ يُ بَرِ يِ تِ لُلُ لَ نُيْ نْيَانِ سَ بُرُومْ مُ نَنْجُ تِ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نُ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [118]

arabicText: فَالشَّيْخُ الْمُرَبِّي هُوَ دَلِيلُ الطَّرِيقِ الَّذِي يُرْشِدُ إِلَى الْحَقِّ لِيَكُونَ عَمَلُنَا كُلُّهُ خَالِصاً لِوَجْهِهِ الْكَرِيمِ بِلَا رِيَاءٍ. [119]
latinTransliteration: Fal-shaykhul-murabbī huwa dalīlut-ṭarīqil-ladhī yurshidu ilal-ḥaqq li-yakūna ‘amalunā kulluhu khāliṣan li-wajhihil-karīmi bilā riyā'. (119)
englishTranslation: The spiritual training guide is the conductor of the path who directs towards Truth, so that all of our work is purely for His Noble Countenance, without ostentation. (Stanza 119)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te Seriñ buy yar, mooy takk-ndëgërlay yoon wi buy gindi jubeel ci dëgg, ngir sunu liggeey yépp sell ngir Moom rekk, andul ak rëy walla féeñ. (Wers 119)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سِرِجْ بُيْ يَرْ مُويْ تَكْ نْدِجِٜrْلَيْ يُونْ وِ بُيْ جِنْدِ جُبِيلْ سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ سُنُ لِجِي يِٚpْ سِلْ نْجِرْ مُومْ رِكْ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ رِي وَلَّ فِيرْ [119]

arabicText: عَقِيدَةُ الْأَشَاعِرَةِ هِيَ الْحِصْنُ الْحَصِينُ لِأَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ فَهَذَا هُوَ الطَّرِيقُ الْوَاضِحُ الَّذِي لَا مِرَاءَ فِيهِ وَلَا غُمُوضَ. [120]
latinTransliteration: ‘Aqīdatul-ashā‘irati hiyal-ḥiṣnul-ḥaṣīnu li-ahlis-sunnati wal-jamā‘ah fahādhā huwat-ṭarīqul-wāḍiḥul-ladhī lā mirā'a fīhi wa lā ghumūḍ. (120)
englishTranslation: The Ash'ari creed is the fortified fortress of the People of Sunnah and Community, for this is the clear path in which there is no dispute or ambiguity. (Stanza 120)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te xam-xamum Ash‘ari mooy ab gaar bu dëgër ngir jullit ñépp ci sunnah, ndax jii mooy yoon wu féeñ wi amul lëndëm walla wax yu dëng. (Wers 120)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ خَمْ خَمُمْ اَشْعَرِي مُويْ اَبْ جَارْ بُ دِࣺجِࣺرْ نْجِرْ جُلِّتْ نْيِࣺپْ سِ سُنَّهْ نْدَخْ جِي مُويْ يُونْ وُ فِيرْ وِ اَمُلْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ وَلَّ وَخْ يُ دِٜnْجْ [120]
